admin: Can manage assigned clients, create staff users, and configure the portal.
advertiser: Can manage ad campaigns, upload creatives, and view performance.
analyst: Read-only access to dashboards, statistics, and reports.
editor: Can create, edit, and publish posts, surveys, and manage content.
god: Full access. Can create clients, manage billing, and view all data.
moderator: Can review reports, moderate comments, and ban abusive users.
